attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/22WEB/2017-06-03/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/22WEB/2017-06-13/Seq00/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (-0.4465, -0.0798) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/10.0 = 1.0.
attrs.history:
2018-04-27 14:57:00 | Combined 1 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/22WEB/2017-06-03_to_2017-06-14/2017-06-03_Seq00_to_2017-06-13_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.

2018-04-27 16:10:10 | Stacked in time from 5 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/22WEB/2017-06-03_to_2017-06-14.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/22WEB/2017-06-25_to_2017-07-12.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/22WEB/2017-07-27_to_2017-08-11.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/22WEB/2017-08-11_to_2017-08-26.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/22WEB/2017-08-25_to_2017-09-08.nc'].
